title: andropogon lateralis var. bogotensis
intro: Andropogon lateralis var. bogotensis, also known as the Bogotá Bluestem, is a type of grass species found in the mountainous regions of Colombia. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Andropogon lateralis var. bogotensis include the treatment of digestive issues, such as diarrhea and dysentery, as well as its use as a wound healer and anti-fever agent. Herbal preparations of this plant typically involve infusions or decoctions, which are made by steeping the leaves and roots in hot water to create a tea that can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
